title: Dark sector under substrate constraints
stage9_round3_summary: Stage 9 round 3 GREEN. All 4 round-1 figure FAILs resolved: (1) fig28_adw_effective_potential caption rewritten to match G/G_c parameterization figure; (2) fig_zhitnitsky_de_theta_scan caption rewritten for Λ_QCD-axis (was wrongly described as θ-scan); (3) fig_phase5x_candidate_viability_matrix margin r=560 width=1500 — all 5 right-edge Lean-anchor annotations now visible; (4) fig_lambda_emerg_parameter_scan: palette swap (steel_blue/amber/Heidelberg/cross + linestyles solid/dash/dot/dashdot, no red/green) + caption rewritten to drop green/yellow/red verdict-band words + locus annotation removed (was at 2.83e-12 GeV outside [10^0, 10^20] display range, kaleido produced 'logμs' artifact at panel edge). 3 cosmetic MINORs persist as advisory (SFDM cluster labels collide; BBN ΔN_eff annotation overlap; EP η annotation overlap on MICROSCOPE bar). Non-blocking under round-2 pass criterion.
stage10_round2_summary: Stage 10 round 2 GREEN — 14/14 PASS / 0 FAIL / 0 WARN. All 8 round-1 BLOCKERs resolved: (1) §12 mechanism-count rewritten to clarify B+C=17 in length-aggregator vs A's 4 inductive-constructor count → 21 total via case-exhaustion + classification via phase6m_class_admits_tier_assignment; (2) abstract reworded to distinguish 4 quantitative-Bayesian + 4 structurally-NO-GO mechanisms with mechanism-specific obstructions; (3) §9.1 itemize collapsed to 8 mechanism-level entries + 2 DEC sub-supports merged inline; (4) BBN theorem names corrected (bbn_violators_share_n_eff_failure_mode + at_least_three_phase5x_candidates_bbn_conformant); (5) BBNUnified.lean → BBN.lean; (6) EquivalencePrincipleClassification + VestigialPhaseEPViolation → EquivalencePrinciple.lean (single module); (7) CosmologicalConstantEmergent.lean → MicroscopicCoefficientMatch.lean; (8) T-0/S-0 attribution moved from HiddenSectorMixedCharge.lean → DarkSectorSynthesis.lean (HiddenSectorMixedCharge retained for C-1). WARN-class (bare critical_coupling_pos in fig28 caption) cleaned up to ADWMechanism.critical_coupling_pos. 1 advisory followup logged: DSCE9 docstring at DarkSectorClassificationExtension.lean:262-266 updated separately to align with theorem body (B+C=17 not 4+8+9=21).
stage13_round1_summary: Stage 13 round 1 GREEN. Tier-1 deep-paper profile sweep across 8 finding classes. Verdict: 0 BLOCKER / 0 RECOMMENDED / 2 ADVISORY. (1) Citations: 7 spot-checked load-bearing bibitems (Touboul2017, PlazaKraiselburd2025fR, YoonGuha2023, TyagiHaridasuBasak2025, LucianoPaliathanasisSaridakis2506, JannesVolovik2012, Berezhiani2015) all present in CITATION_REGISTRY. (2) Numerical claims: ρ_DE ≈ 6.7×10⁻⁹ eV⁴ + MICROSCOPE η<10⁻¹⁵ + 17-vs-21 mechanism count all internally consistent. (3) Lean-theorem-name resolution: 19 named theorems spot-verified via grep; all resolve. (4) Cross-bundle: D2 + D3 paper_drafts not yet lifted, so cross-bundle re-check deferred to D2/D3 lift; intra-bundle clean. (5) 'First' claims (first complete-mechanism-family unanimous NO-GO closure / first systematic Λ_J vs Λ_HK on common substrate) corroborated against ARCHITECTURE_SCOPE.md + Phase6m_Roadmap.md + PAPER_DRAFT_MAPPING.md. (6) Production-run claims N/A (theory paper). (7) freshness_stale: false; manifest current. (8) Architectural-scope: tracked-hypothesis discipline in place; ADVISORY 1 noted §4 prose says 'tracked Lean hypothesis H_S0_thermalized/H_FG_thermalized' but Lean implements via theorem-hypothesis parameter h_thermalize, not a named def H_FOO Prop. ADVISORY 2 noted as low-priority cross-checking. QI Candidate raised: QI-D5-1 (low priority) — validator for prose-vs-Lean tracked-hypothesis name resolution; would catch §4 H_S0_thermalized/H_FG_thermalized prose-vs-implementation gap prospectively.
notes: Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.2 CLOSED at GREEN 2026-05-01. 12-page Tier-1 deep-paper bundle (target PRD) shipped through full reviewer-triple pipeline: Stage 9 (3 rounds; 4 figure FAILs → GREEN), Stage 10 (2 rounds; 8 claim FAILs + 1 WARN → GREEN with 14/14 PASS), Stage 13 (1 round; 0 BLOCKER GREEN). 6 sources lifted via bundle_append.py: paper17 §2-§3 + paper29 §4 + paper32 §5 + paper34 §6 + paper42b §7 + D5_phase6m_lean_only §8-§12 (D.4 sourceless pattern). 19 bibitems all registered + cached. Substantive new contribution: §9 Track B 8/8 unanimous NO-GO closure (first complete-mechanism-family closure in Phase 6m; 4 quantitative-Bayesian aggregated in all_quantitative_bounds_exceed_jeffreys_decisive + 4 structurally-NO-GO via mechanism-specific obstructions); §11 Sakharov 4-criterion cross-bridge (³He-A satisfies all 4; FLS BEC violates condition (ii); first systematic Λ_J vs Λ_HK on common substrate); §12 unified 7-class GD taxonomy with 3-tier applicability gradient + phase6m_class_admits_tier_assignment. 2 advisories carried forward: D5-S13-A1 §4 H_S0/FG_thermalized prose-vs-implementation gap (h_thermalize is theorem-parameter not named def); D5-S13-A2 cross-bundle re-check deferred to D2/D3 lift. 17 supersession-ledger entries appended (401 → 418). LaTeX compile clean throughout. lake build clean (2186 jobs / 2.8s on docstring change verification).
